summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Manual Resolution Generation feature (POST /api/resoluciones/generar-manual). All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verification confirmed all components working correctly: Tipo de Mutación selector with M1/M2/M3 options, auto-generated Número de Resolución (RES-54-128-0001-2026), Fecha de Resolución with current date default, Radicado de Petición search with autocomplete suggestions, and Vista previa panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual Resolution Generation feature fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/resoluciones/generar-manual (generates PDF, saves to DB, updates predio historial, finalizes linked petition), GET /api/resoluciones/siguiente-numero/{codigo_municipio} (auto-generates resolution number based on municipality code), GET /api/resoluciones/radicados-disponibles (searches petitions for linking). Frontend section 'Información de Resolución' in edit predio modal displays: Tipo de Mutación selector, auto-generated Número de Resolución, Fecha de Resolución with date picker, Radicado de Petición with autocomplete search. Only coordinadores and administradores can access this section.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/resoluciones/generar-manual: PASS - Generates PDF, saves to DB

frontend_ui.edit_predio_modal: PASS - Opens correctly with predio data
frontend_ui.tipo_mutacion_selector: PASS - Native select with M1, M2, M3 options
frontend_ui.fecha_resolucion_field: PASS - Shows current date with date picker
frontend_ui.vista_previa_panel: PASS - Shows preview of resolution number and date

integration.predio_historial_update: PASS - historial_resoluciones array grows with each resolution
